en.name: Safariland Liberator HP 2.0 Hearing Protection Headset (MultiCam)
en.description: A next generation low-profile active headset, designed to protect the user's hearing from external factors. Manufactured by Safariland. MultiCam version.

en.name: Peltor ComTac VI headset (Black)
en.description: An improved version of the ComTac V communication headset, equipped with advanced environmental listening settings and an NIB (Natural Interaction Behavior) feature, allowing to communicate with other ComTac VI users in a certain proximity without having to use radios. Manufactured by 3M Peltor. Black version.

en.name: Walker's Razor Digital headset (Molon Labe)
en.description: The Razor electronic ear muffs feature an ultra low-profile design and a rubberized coating for added durability and comfort, also providing optimal hearing protection. Manufactured by Walker's. A version for the true gladiators.

en.name: TW EXFIL Peltor ComTac VI headset (Black)
en.description: An improved version of the ComTac V communication headset, equipped with advanced environmental listening settings and an NIB (Natural Interaction Behavior) feature, allowing to communicate with other ComTac VI users in a certain proximity without having to use radios. Equipped with a mount for attaching the headset to Team Wendy EXFIL helmets. Manufactured by 3M Peltor. Black version.

en.name: TW EXFIL Peltor ComTac VI headset (Ranger Green)
en.description: An improved version of the ComTac V communication headset, equipped with advanced environmental listening settings and an NIB (Natural Interaction Behavior) feature, allowing to communicate with other ComTac VI users in a certain proximity without having to use radios. Equipped with a mount for attaching the headset to Team Wendy EXFIL helmets. Manufactured by 3M Peltor. Ranger Green version.
